channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Winnipeg Treaty One proposes 6,000-seat arena to attract professional or junior sports teams
item.description: Winnipeg Treaty One, a local Indigenous group, is advocating for the construction of a 6,000-seat arena in Winnipeg to attract professional or junior sports teams. The proposal, reported on July 2, 20...

item.title: Anti-Immigrant Violence in Johannesburg Leaves Immigrant Families Traumatized
item.description: Immigrant families in Johannesburg and surrounding areas have been targeted in violent attacks by anti-immigrant protesters, leaving many traumatized. Reports indicate that stoning, beatings with stic...

item.title: Labrador Municipality Commemorates 2016 Arbitral Award on July 12
item.description: The municipality of Labrador, Pangasinan, has officially declared July 12 as 'West Philippine Sea Victory Day' annually to honor the 2016 Arbitral Award that affirmed the Philippines' maritime rights....

item.title: Canada's West Coast Pipeline Project Receives Approval
item.description: The article discusses the approval of a major pipeline project connecting Alberta's oilsands to the West Coast, highlighting the political negotiations between federal and provincial governments. Key ...

item.title: Global Financial Crisis of 2026: Key Developments and Impacts
item.description: The article discusses the Global Financial Crisis of 2026, highlighting its causes, including unsustainable debt levels, speculative bubbles, and geopolitical tensions. It outlines how major economies...

item.title: Children in Sydney Detention Centres Face Legal Uncertainty
item.description: The article discusses the overcrowding of Sydney's youth detention centres, which house children as young as 12 charged with crimes ranging from shoplifting to murder. Less than four per cent of these...

item.title: GTA VI Launches Digital-Only with Physical Editions Containing Download Codes Only
item.description: Grand Theft Auto VI, one of the most anticipated video games in years, has sparked significant backlash not primarily over its high price tag of £69.99 in the UK and $79.99 in the US, but because its ...

item.title: President Tinubu References First Lady as 'Iya Alakara' at Press Dinner
item.description: President Bola Ahmed joined an online trend by playfully calling First Lady Senator Oluremi Tinubu 'Iya Alakara' (mother of an akara seller) during the inaugural Presidential Press Corps Dinner. This ...

item.title: Sowore says ruling class targets him over activism and free speech claims
item.description: Omoyele Sowore, the 2027 presidential candidate of the African Action Congress (AAC), has alleged that people in power in Nigeria have always shown what he described as a long-standing or ‘historic an...

item.title: Tanzanian President and Gates Foundation Launch Maternal and Child Health Initiative in Africa
item.description: Tanzanian President Samia Suluhu Hassan has partnered with the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation to launch a major initiative aimed at improving maternal and child health across Africa. This collaborati...

item.title: Islamabad High Court halts NHA's additional toll collection on non-M-Tag users
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) has issued a stay order preventing the National Highway Authority (NHA) from collecting additional toll charges from non-M-Tag users and motorists with low balances. The...

item.title: Taxi driver faces legal consequences after fleeing crime scene and accepting public donations
item.description: A taxi driver in Southport has faced legal scrutiny after allegedly abandoning a murder suspect at the scene of a crime and subsequently accepting public donations to fund a new car. The incident, whi...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Plan to Marry in Grand NYC Celebration
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are set to exchange vows in a lavish wedding event at Madison Square Garden, following whispers of a secret ceremony. The couple, known for their high-profile relationshi...

item.title: Wife convicted of murdering retired businessman with paring knife after court rules stabbing was intentional
item.description: A woman has been jailed for 12 years after being convicted of murdering her retired husband with a paring knife. The court ruled that the stabbing was intentional, citing forensic evidence and the nat...

item.title: Moi University to implement workforce reduction plan to cut monthly wage bill by Sh100 million
item.description: Moi University has moved to revive its redundancy programme aimed at reducing its rising wage bill and stabilising its financial position. The institution has been granted approval by the court to res...

item.title: Supreme Court Orders Return of Seized Vessel and Crude Oil to GHL
item.description: The Supreme Court of Nigeria has overturned the judgment of the Court of Appeal that ordered the seizure of an oil vessel and its cargo of crude oil belonging to General Hydrocarbons Limited (GHL) to ...

item.title: Wimbledon faces backlash over influencer overload and commercialization concerns
item.description: The article reports on growing frustration among Wimbledon tennis fans due to the overwhelming presence of influencers and brand promoters at the prestigious tennis tournament. Originally titled as a ...

item.title: Victorian Liberal crisis deepens as Deeming legal battle delays deselection
item.description: Victorian Liberal MP Moira Deeming has delayed her potential deselection from the party after launching a legal challenge against party president Brian Loughnane. The court injunction has postponed th...

item.title: Nellore's Nexus Innovation Hub Aims to Boost Tech Jobs and Local Talent
item.description: The Nexus Innovation Hub, a 200-seat technology and product development facility, was launched in Nellore, Andhra Pradesh, marking a significant step towards relocating tech companies to Tier-II citie...

item.title: Charlie Curnow's six-goal performance leads Swans to victory over Bulldogs
item.description: In a thrilling AFL 2026 clash at the SCG, the Sydney Swans showcased their attacking prowess with a dominant 35-point victory over the Western Bulldogs. Superstar recruit Charlie Curnow delivered a st...
